findings.location: s5 (Java Beansオブジェクトの設定を上書きする)
findings.description: The second XML code example demonstrating same-class property inheritance is omitted. The source includes a concrete code block showing that when overriding with the same class and no property elements, the previous `prop=message` value is still inherited.
findings.source_evidence:
Source: `<component name="sample" class="sample.SampleBean">
  <property name="prop" value="message" />
</component>
<!-- propertyを設定していないが、上書き前のpropの値が引き継がれる -->
<component name="sample" class="sample.SampleBean" />` — Knowledge file explains the behavior in text only, with no supporting code example.

findings.location: s7 (ListやMapを設定値として使う)
findings.description: Code examples for named list (`<list name="strList">` with `ref="strList"`) and named map (`<map name="map">` with `ref="map"`) references are absent. The knowledge file only notes the feature textually ('任意の名前を設定し`property`要素で名前参照も可能') without showing the exact XML syntax.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains two code blocks: one showing `<list name="strList">` defined separately and referenced via `<property name="stringList" ref="strList" />`, and one showing `<map name="map">` referenced via `<property name="map" ref="map">`. Both are absent from s7.
